mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 150k signals robust labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings expectations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production above 102.0 indicates expanding manufacturing activity that supports corporate profits, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 102.0.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth above 2% annualized signals robust economic demand that lifts equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 50%+ of instances where GDPC1 exceeds 2.0.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in both the federal funds rate and inflation expectations compress real rates, creating a favorable environment for equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where both FEDFUNDS < 1.0 and CPIAUCSL < 2.0.

mechanism_narrative: Low unemployment below 4.5% signals tight labor market conditions that may lead to inflationary pressures, prompting monetary policy tightening and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE < 4.5.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts below 1500 indicate weak demand for residential construction, reducing corporate revenues and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST < 1500.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in consumer credit and payroll employment signals strong household demand and labor market conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where both RSAFS > 480000 and PAYEMS > 150000.
